title: CHANGING THE NAME OF COMMITTE OF PUBLIC CHARITIES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
title_en: CHANGING THE NAME OF COMMITTE OF PUBLIC CHARITIES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES

provisions.section: CHANGING THE NAME OF COMMITTE OF PUBLIC CHARITIES AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES
provisions.title: All laws or parts of laws in conflict herewith
provisions.content:
Articulo 4. All laws or parts of laws in conflict herewith
are hereby repealed.
THOMAS SNOWDEN,
Rear-Admiral, United States Navy,
Military Governor of Santo Domingo.
Santo Domingo, D. R.,
Mar. 14,1921.
